name: Del Valle Mexican Restaurant

seoDescription: Del Valle Mexican Restaurant in Santa Rosa, CA. Authentic family-owned Mexican food, mariscos, tacos, burritos and catering on Sebastopol Rd.

hero.heading: Authentic Mexican Flavors in Roseland

Authentic mariscos including molcajete de mariscos and ceviche tostadas

about.heading: About Del Valle Mexican Restaurant
body: Since 2017, Del Valle Mexican Restaurant has been a cornerstone of Santa Rosa's Roseland District, serving up the rich, authentic flavors of Mexico with exceptional service. This family-owned taqueria on Sebastopol Road brings bold, traditional tastes to the neighborhood every day of the week.

From sizzling fajitas and hearty molcajetes to fresh mariscos, breakfast chilaquiles and street-style tacos, the kitchen cooks the dishes families grew up on. Whether you dine in, order takeout, or book catering for an event, Del Valle delivers the genuine taste of home.

services.title: Tacos
services.description: Street-style tacos with your choice of meats, plus fish tacos topped with fresh ingredients.

services.title: Burritos
services.description: Regular and Super Burritos with rice, beans and up to eight meat choices, wrapped to order.

services.title: Mariscos
services.description: Seafood specialties like molcajete de mariscos, ceviche and shrimp tostadas, and camarones con tocino.

services.title: Molcajetes & Fajitas
services.description: Steak, chicken, shrimp or mixed molcajetes and fajitas served with rice, beans and tortillas.

services.title: Breakfast
services.description: Morning plates including chilaquiles con huevo, huevos con bistec and traditional Mexican breakfasts.

services.title: Catering
services.description: Taco bars, burrito bowls, quesadillas, sopes, tortas and large-batch pozole, menudo and birria for events.

items.a: You'll find us at 2000 Sebastopol Road Santa Rosa, CA, 95407 United States.
Mon – Thu: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM; Fri – Sat: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Sun: 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at 707-595-1081 — we're glad to help.
